dialogue_turns.content: Hi! My name is Grace. Nice to meet you!
Nice to meet you too, Grace! How can I help you today?
I work as a mobile developer. I've been doing this for a few years now.
That's great! A mobile developer — sounds interesting. What kind of things do you work on?
I mostly work with testing, analytics.
Got it! Sounds like you have a solid skill set.
Outside of work I enjoy chess, podcasting. I also like reading about data visualization.
Those are some great hobbies! Always good to have a healthy work-life balance.
By the way, I'm also interested in R.
